design_philosophy: Spacious layout with confirmation gates; protects daily Importers from wrong-file uploads.
strengths: Generous whitespace lets daily Importers spot the right file before clicking.
Every destructive action opens a confirm step with default focus on Keep.
Required fields and inline help reduce wrong-file uploads on the upload form.
weaknesses: Fewer rows fit on screen, so high-volume reviewers will scroll more often.
Extra confirmation steps slow the keyboard-first experts who never miss-click.
Spacious layout means less context visible side-by-side for deep audits.
tradeoffs: Trades throughput for safety: Importers move slower but make fewer expensive mistakes on file uploads and cancellations.
use_when: Importers who upload daily but care more about getting it right than getting it done fast.
